---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open the game
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior
What you thought would happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser + version: (e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 132, Safari 18)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17, Android 14)
- Screen size: desktop / tablet / phone
- Saved progress: yes / no — if yes, roughly what you've researched

## Console errors
Open the browser DevTools console (F12) and paste any red errors here.

```
(paste errors here)
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, drop in a screenshot or short clip.

## Anything else?
Mods? Browser extensions? First-time playing? Reproducible every time?
